title: alyssum montanum var. brigantiacum
intro: Alyssum montanum var. brigantiacum, also known as mountain sweet alyssum, is a perennial herb of the mustard family. It is used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as soothing digestive problems. Alyssum montanum var. brigantiacum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
